response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of professional C/C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014-2015) plus a university thesis, far short of the required 5-10 years. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed, and no exposure to Fixed Income, capital markets, investment banking, or Windows-platform development. The candidate's strengths lie in web/full-stack TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang work — none of which align with the core requirements of this role.
strengths: Long-tenured senior engineer with broad full-stack and systems experience
Some prior low-level C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and on a C++ audio thesis project
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, pairing
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience vs. the 5-10 years required
No SQL Server or Oracle experience, and no Windows-platform development history
Zero domain background in Fixed Income, capital markets, or investment banking

key_factors.factor: No Fixed Income / capital markets domain
